# Napa Sonoma Guide — Napa & Sonoma Valley Wineries

> A comprehensive directory of wineries in Napa Valley and Sonoma County, California.

## About

Napa Sonoma Guide is a free, searchable directory of 208+ wineries across Napa Valley and Sonoma County. The site provides detailed profiles including wines produced, tasting experiences with pricing, hours, amenities, and visitor information.

## Data Coverage

- 208+ wineries across Napa Valley and Sonoma County
- 2,075+ wines cataloged across 22 varietals (Cabernet Sauvignon, Pinot Noir, Chardonnay, and more)
- 670+ tasting experiences with pricing from $25 to $500+
- Sub-regions: Oakville, Rutherford, St. Helena, Yountville, Calistoga, Carneros, Stags Leap, Russian River Valley, Dry Creek Valley, Sonoma Valley, and more

## Key Facts

- Average Napa Valley tasting costs $50-75
- Average Sonoma County tasting costs $25-50
- Napa Valley: ~130 wineries across 8 sub-regions
- Sonoma County: ~80 wineries across 6 sub-regions
- Dog-friendly wineries: 40+
- Walk-ins welcome: 60+
- Picnic-friendly: 50+

## Key Features

- Search and filter wineries by region, price, rating, varietal, and amenities
- Detailed winery profiles with wines, tastings, hours, and contact info
- Interactive map view of all wineries
- Side-by-side winery comparison tool
- Curated day-trip route suggestions
- 100+ programmatic guide pages (dog-friendly, budget, by varietal, by sub-region)
- Amenity filters: dog-friendly, picnic-friendly, walk-ins welcome

## Useful URLs

- Homepage: https://napasonomaguide.com
- Browse all wineries: https://napasonomaguide.com/wineries
- Map view: https://napasonomaguide.com/map
- Day trip routes: https://napasonomaguide.com/day-trips
- Individual winery pages: https://napasonomaguide.com/wineries/{winery-slug}
- Napa Valley guide: https://napasonomaguide.com/napa-valley
- Sonoma County guide: https://napasonomaguide.com/sonoma-county
- Trip planner: https://napasonomaguide.com/plan-trip

## Contact

This site is maintained as an independent guide to help visitors plan wine country trips.
